use_cases: Promoting mobile app downloads on landing pages with QR code integration
Showcasing app features and benefits with animated scroll-triggered reveals
Driving app installation conversions through visual product demonstration
Cross-promoting companion apps for SaaS or e-commerce platforms
Creating engaging app marketing sections with staggered content animations
ai_summary: A promotional landing section component for driving app downloads, featuring a two-column layout with feature and benefit lists, QR code integration, and animated product imagery. Built with Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations including staggered reveals and spring-based transitions. Fully responsive with adaptive grid layouts for desktop and mobile platforms.
